content:
Check mail daily or meet the mail deliverer at their post on an ever-sliding timescale; impossible: mailboxes don't have notifications:

‘look at me!’

I summon thee to write a misplaced letter. Any form is appropriate!

Do I rip you up and shred you? Do I put you in an office drawer for later consideration? Do I look up your information via your John Hancock because your letter needs to be seen by that who twas intended? Do we use you to line the bottom of our birdcage?

~One-Hundred hard-copies of the project will be printed and available.

—make cover before sending email
